title: Christian Wahnschaffe, 2. Teil - Die Flucht aus dem goldenen Kerker
writer: Jakob Wassermann, Bobby E. Lüthge, Hans Behrendt
actors: Conrad Veidt, Rose Müller, Werner Krauss
plot: A wealthy industrialist's son who dabbles in radical politics in the Weimar era meets up with a pimp while slumming in a miserable working class rooming house.
